arts.ttl: Milan agree personal terms with Torino’s Samuele Ricci
arts.sum: Serie A giants Milan have agreed personal terms with a move to sign Torino midfielder Samuele Ricci. The Italy international signed a new deal with Il Toro some weeks…

arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Genoa: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season reaches the half way point, Torino and Genoa prepare to face off in a closely contested mid-table battle at the Stadio Olimpico Grande Torino on Saturday evening. With just one point separating the two sides in the standings, this match could prove pivotal in determining their final league positions. The post Serie A | Torino v Genoa: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Vanja Milinkovic-Savic was again clutch against Atalanta as he saved a second half penalty to secure a massive point for Torino in Bergamo last weekend. On the other hand, Genoa were unable to comple...
